items.title: Former Infosys chief has a new startup that wants to challenge the IT services world
items.summary: Backed by Mayfield and Aramco Ventures, Vishal Sikka’s new venture brings together veterans from SAP, Infosys, and VianAI.

items.title: After successfully selling over 15 cars, Faraday Future would now like you to buy its robots
items.summary: Farday Future hasn't quite given up on EVs, but it's now also pitching a lineup of robots, including humanoids and a quadruped with an optional canine heads.
